events.place: VERIFIED- Burton Manor/Park/Estate, Duncton Parish, Sussex, England  -Inherited in the 15th century by the Goring's, who probably built the 1st house on the site. In 1724 it passed by marriage to the Biddulph's.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Dyke於1475年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Henry Dyke Esq4歲，母親Eleanor Pakenham8歲。她於1490年與Sir John Goring IV在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1521年10月16日在英國斯塔福爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Dyke于1475年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Henry Dyke Esq4岁，母亲Eleanor Pakenham8岁。她于1490年与Sir John Goring IV在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1521年10月16日在英国斯塔福爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dyke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) dike’, from Middle English dik(e), deke ‘ditch, dyke’ (Old English dīc), or a habitational name from Dyke in Lincolnshire. The medieval dike was larger and more prominent than the modern ditch, and was usually constructed for purposes of defense rather than drainage. Compare Ditch .
Americanized form of Dutch Dijk or Dijke, cognates of 1. Compare Van Dyke and Dyk .

variants.name: Dickman
meanings: English: from Middle English dich(e), dike ‘dike, earthwork’ + man ‘man’ (Old English dīc + mann), hence an occupational name for someone who worked at a ditch or dike, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a ditch or dike. See also Dyke and compare Dicker .
English: occupational name meaning ‘servant (Middle English man) of Dick ’.
Americanized form of Dutch Dijkman, see Dykman .

variants.name: Dicker
meanings: English: occupational name for a digger of ditches or a builder of dikes, from Middle English dicher, diker ‘digger of ditches or dykes’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a ditch or dike (such as a defensive ditch round a town), from Middle English dik, deke (Old English dīc) ‘ditch’ + -er. It was synonymous with Middle English atte Dike (see Dyke ), and with Ditcher and Dickman . Topographical surnames in -er are characteristic of southern England.

English: habitational name from The Dicker, the name of a common in Arlington, Chiddingly, and Hellingly in Sussex, from Middle English dyker, a unit of ten (from Latin decuria, from decem ‘ten’), though the reason for the place being so named is not clear. It has been suggested that the reference is to a bundle of iron rods, in which sense dicras appears in the Domesday Book. Such a bundle could have been the rent for property in this iron-working area. Surname forms such as atte dicker occur in the surrounding region in the 13th and 14th centuries.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Dick   3, from an inflected form.

variants.name: Diss
meanings: English (Essex, Middlesex, and Cambridgeshire): habitational name from Diss in Norfolk, from a Norman pronunciation of Middle English diche, Old English dīc ‘ditch, dike’ (see Dyke ).
German: from a short form of the personal name   Matthias  .

variants.name: Ditch
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): topographic name for someone who lived by a ditch, from Middle English dich(e), deche ‘ditch, dike’ (Old English dīc). Compare Dyke .

variants.name: Dike
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Dijk, see Dyke .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Dyke was born in 1475, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Henry Dyke Esq, was 4 and her mother, Eleanor Pakenham, was 8. She married Sir John Goring IV in 1490, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 16 October 1521, in Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Dyke est née en 1475, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Dyke Esq, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Pakenham, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Goring IV en 1490, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1521, à Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Dyke 1475 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Dyke Esq 4 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Pakenham 8. Sie hat 1490 in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England Sir John Goring IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1521 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Dyke è nata il nel 1475 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Henry Dyke Esq, aveva 4 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Pakenham, aveva 8 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Goring IV nel 1490, nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1521, nel Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Dykeが1475年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Dyke Esqは4歳，母Eleanor Pakenhamは8歳であった。1490年にイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツでSir John Goring IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1521年10月16日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルトン ウプオン トレントで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Dyke(이)가 1475년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Dyke Esq(은)는 4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Pakenham(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 Sir John Goring IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 10월 16일 영국 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Dyke nasceu em 1475, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Dyke Esq, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Pakenham, tinha 8 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Goring IV em 1490, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1521, em Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Dyke родилась в 1475 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Dyke Esq было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Pakenham, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Goring IV в 1490 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 16 октября 1521 г. в местности буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Dyke nació en 1475, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Dyke Esq, tenía 4 años y su mamá, Eleanor Pakenham, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Sir John Goring IV en 1490, en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1521, en Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
